loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC-1A outgoing feeder consumption (UPS, BPDB, Solar Incomers); Solar Incomer members have no live data (has_data=N) so their breakdown values are blank.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing real-time power distribution across active feeders (UPS, BPDB, Solar Incomers); HHF Reactive feeders are not present in the primary member roster. Load % is omitted as no rated_kva is available for the GIC-* meters.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; headroom unavailable due to unknown nameplate rating.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; Power Factor uses kpi_true_pf (unsigned) to avoid reverse-CT sign inversion.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-member panel rollup — some feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are offline and will render as blanks.
